markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening an AI Engineer candidate for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong MLOps Background:** Manuel has deep experience productionizing ML models (Rappi), building feature/vector stores, and optimizing inference.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Vector DB Optimization:** At Graphite, he replaced Pinecone with PgVector for its multi-query efficiency, then cut AWS disk costs by reducing vector size (PCA) and precision (half-precision).](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** Manuel's vision for AI-driven content (automating drafts for human editors) aligns with growthx.ai's agent-based pipeline, contrasting with Graphite's "human-only" writing philosophy.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)
  - [**Flexible Culture Fit:** Manuel confirmed growthx.ai's output-based culture, which offers the flexibility he values for managing personal commitments like family.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=3441.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai: Context & Vision

  - [**Company:** \~80 people; 15-person engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Origin:** Grew from a marketing agency using AI tools to an internal product team building its own SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Product Vision:** An agent-based content pipeline that automates first drafts, enabling human editors to focus on strategy and refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=2788.0)
  - [**Market View:** AI search (Gemini) will increase demand for high-volume, constantly updated content, making websites "content production machines."](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)

### Candidate Background: Manuel Valderrama

  - [**Education:** Electronic Engineering (B.S.), Computer Science (M.S.).](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Omnicon:** PLC programming, industrial IoT (ML for machine failure prediction).](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**CIAT:** Research on image-based crop yield prediction (drones, satellites).](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Rappi:** MLOps engineer for the "predictions team."](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
          - [**Role:** Productionize ML models, build microservices, create observability tools.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
          - [**Projects:** Built a vector/feature store (Snowflake) to predict delivery times.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Graphite:** ML Engineer (2022–2025).](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
          - [**Focus:** Building internal SaaS tools for content writers.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
          - [**Layoff:** Part of a team of 9 laid off when Graphite killed its SaaS vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)

### Key Project: Vector Database Optimization at Graphite

  - [**Goal:** Group Google topics (keywords) by intent using SERP titles.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [**Initial Challenge (Pinecone):** Inefficient for multi-query requests needed to find a topic and its neighbors simultaneously.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Solution 1 (PgVector):** Replaced Pinecone for its multi-query efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Solution 2 (Cost Reduction):** Addressed high AWS disk costs from large embeddings.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**PCA:** Reduced vector dimensionality.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
      - [**Half-Precision:** Migrated to 16-bit vectors, cutting index size by 50%.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [**Binary Embeddings:** POC showed good results but required a full database rebuild.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [**Unsuccessful Attempt:** An HNSW index failed to build due to complex hyperparameter tuning.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)

### Other Graphite Projects

  - [**Brief Automation Tool:** Scraped competitor content to generate SEO briefs, questions, and answers for writers.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [**Multi-LLM Routing:** Used multiple models (Gemini, Perplexity) to provide writers with diverse perspectives for comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
  - [**LLM-as-a-Judge:** Used an LLM to classify topic quality (binary score), helping filter bad keywords and correct misspellings.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [**Agentic Writer POC:** A proof-of-concept for automated long-form content was shelved due to Graphite's "premium human content" philosophy.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:** Discuss Manuel's candidacy with Tucker.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=3680.0)
  - [**Tucker:** Follow up with Manuel regarding next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/vNkKy1awx77wWVGCSMzhCggocJVngE_h?tab=summary&timestamp=3680.0)
